evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses current signInWithPassword (v2), getSession, onAuthStateChange. JWT verification with HS256 and audience='authenticated' is consistent. Explicitly contrasts v1 signIn as deprecated. Internally consistent and version-claimed.
evidence.executability: All fenced blocks parse. Minor issue: Auth.jsx buttons inside a <form> with no type=button will submit form on click, but handlers call preventDefault. python-jose installs fine. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok, sudo, etc).
evidence.completeness: All 6 pieces present: (a) key acquisition via dashboard Settings>API Keys, (b) pip/npm install blocks, (c) explicit .env templates for both, (d) FastAPI backend code, (e) React frontend code, (f) pytest test command. Env var names consistent across listing and references.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official supabase.com/docs URLs cited at end ([1],[2],[3],[5]); also third-party (markaicode, divjoy). Inline [2]/[4] markers reference code sections. Placement mostly at end but inline markers near code.

rubric_notes: Strong playbook. Pip install lacks pinned versions despite constraint (c) request, but env vars and method names are correct and consistent.
